memberdef.name: CK_CLI_DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS
memberdef.initializer: -1 /* -1 means use model default (stop at EOS) */

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* embed_t) (const int32_t *tokens, int num_tokens)
memberdef.name: embed_t

detaileddescription.para: Apply chat template to user prompt. Returns allocated string (caller must free) or NULL on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *json, const char *key, int32_t *out, int max_count)
memberdef.name: extract_json_int_array

detaileddescription.para: Extract an array of integers from JSON.
Simple JSON string extraction - finds a key and returns the value string. Returns pointer to malloc'd string (caller must free) or NULL on error.
Initialize stop token lookup table from manifest metadata.
Check if token is a stop token (O(1) lookup). Returns true if token should stop generation.
Load chat template from chat_template.json or weights_manifest.json. Returns true if template was loaded, false otherwise.
